summary: Tighten write-gate API status matching and restrict HTTP cache permissions.
reason: Greptile flagged that an unreachable API status contained the reachable substring and that cached Marketplace responses were world-readable on multi-user systems.
validated_outcome: gofmt on touched Go files, go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./..., verify_manifest.py, and verify_publish_package.py passed.
